title: Częstochowa, Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Częstochowa, Silesian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Częstochowa is a city in Silesian with a population of 222,292. Poland’s spiritual capital, home to the iconic Jasna Góra Monastery and the Black Madonna, one of the most important Catholic pilgrimage sites in the world.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
